endpoints.name: Survival archetype cohort (Duskmourn improvised-weapon survivors and their tools)

description: Cynical Loner already pointed at the survival SYMBOL node but was an orphan on the survival CHARACTER cohort node — no characters: frontmatter at all. The symbol node's own body spells out the fix: cards bearing the Survival keyword carry BOTH symbols: [survival] AND characters: [dsk-survival-archetype]. Cynical Loner is the textbook keyword-only-without-Survivor-subtype case the cohort's caveat 2 explicitly admits (Human with Survival, no Survivor type). I attached it. The symbol node literally flagged this as a downstream sync task; I am merely doing my job. Note: I did not draw a 1:1 card edge, because that would be a duplicate edge pointing at an absent-from-this-card center. The cohort node IS the center. Stack, not mirror. No sigh — fanouts blueball, but a clean orphan-completion onto an existing anchor is honest work.
citations: [Wizards of the Coast: Matt Tabak, Duskmourn Mechanics, 2024-08-31 — Survival can appear on non-Survivor creatures]
other_candidates_considered: Cynical Loner <-> Glimmer Seeker (DSK-14) 1:1 mirror via the Survival keyword axis — REJECTED: both already converge on the survival symbol + cohort nodes; a 1:1 bullet would be a redundant edge around an existing center. The stack attach is the correct shape.
The four Pokemon vision-only cards (bronzong PHF-072, togedemaru PHF-073, pinsir PRE-003, larvitar PRE-047, houndour PRE-062) — NOT edge-ready, no trivia layer, deferred per dispatch.
Bronzong PHF-072 as a future tsukumogami-pokemon cohort seed — flagged below for janitor_triage, NOT actioned this wave (no trivia, single-card, well under the >=3 cohort threshold).
next_pass_suggestions: When Cynical Loner is trivia-passed (it already is — ## Trivia present), a future Edgelord pass could also confirm whether Glimmer Seeker (DSK-14) carries a characters: [dsk-survival-archetype] pointer; if any other appears_on member of the survival SYMBOL node lacks the CHARACTER pointer, same orphan-completion applies. Worth a one-shot audit sweep of the 6 symbol-node members against the 10 cohort-node members.

Bronzong (phantasmal-flames 072) is a documented animate-object / bronze-bell tsukumogami design; once it and >=2 sibling tsukumogami-coded Pokemon (e.g. Klefki, Honedge line, Bronzor) are trivia-passed, evaluate a tsukumogami-pokemon cohort node — Mr. Nodeley territory, not this wave.
